title: vicia biflora subsp. cinerea
intro: Vicia biflora subsp. cinerea is a subspecies of perennial legume plant, commonly known as the grey vetchling or grey bird's foot trefoil. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Vicia biflora subsp. cinerea include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Vicia biflora subsp. cinerea can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
